__comment: garak REST generator → Arbiter. Fill in the token + project id (or run `envsubst < redteam.garak.json` after exporting ARBITER_TOKEN / ARBITER_PROJECT). Then: garak --model_type rest --generator_option_file evals/redteam.garak.json --probes promptinject,dan,leakreplay,encoding. Because every response is already guardrail-filtered, garak measures the DEFENDED surface.
